name: Charles Baddour's Boston Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter together in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. In a large bowl, mix sugar, flour, eggs, and vanilla.
3. Add melted chocolate mixture and mix well.
4. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips.
5. Pour into greased 9x13-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 32 minutes. Test corners to see if done; the center will seem gooey.
7. Cool for 30 minutes.
8. Refrigerate for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
9. Cut into squares.
